title: OVERNIGHT COOLING SHELTER - 211info
text: THE LIGHTHOUSE NAVIGATION CENTER OVERNIGHT COOLING SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers overnight shelter throughout the summer season. Meals provided. 275 NE 2nd Street Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Adults age 18 and older, pets are allowed but must be with owner. Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (541) 318-0729 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 318-0729 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Deschutes County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: In front of Bi-Mart Services: Extreme Weather Shelters If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
